query: What usually pushes the price up?
direct_answer: For Porch & Party, hotel-room celebration setups start at $300+. Smaller installs may stay close to that floor, while fuller setups increase based on materials, complexity, timing, and room access.
best_for: This is for clients trying to understand whether a hotel-room setup fits their budget before they submit the quote form.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
